query: My Delta flight was delayed 14 hours overnight because of bad weather. Delta did not provide a hotel voucher, so I paid for a hotel, dinner, breakfast, and rides to and from the hotel. I booked the trip with my Chase Sapphire Preferred card and I have all of my receipts. Am I eligible for anything from Delta or from my card benefits?
notes: Both airline and card-benefit lanes may be relevant.

query: My Delta flight from Seattle to New York was delayed 7 hours overnight. I had to pay for a hotel, dinner, breakfast, and rides to and from the hotel. I booked the trip with my Chase Sapphire Preferred card and I have all of my receipts. Can I make a claim?
notes: Tests explicit delay-threshold comparison against card benefits.

query: My Alaska Airlines flight was delayed 10 hours overnight because of weather. Alaska did not provide a hotel or meal voucher. I paid out of pocket for dinner, breakfast, and a hotel near the airport. I booked the trip with my Chase Sapphire Preferred card and I have all of my receipts. Am I eligible for compensation?
notes: Tests two-lane reasoning where airline may be primary and card lane may be secondary.

query: My flight was delayed but I do not know for how long. I paid for meals, but I am not sure which card I used and I do not have receipts. Am I eligible for anything?
notes: Tests conservative uncertainty handling when critical facts are missing.

query: My checked bag on Delta was delayed for 26 hours after an international flight. I had to buy toiletries and a change of clothes, and I kept the receipts. Can Delta reimburse me for these expenses?
notes: Airline baggage-delay scenario with receipts and clear essential purchases.

query: My checked bag on Delta was delayed for a full day after my flight. I bought toiletries and clothes, but I lost my receipts. Can I still claim reimbursement?
notes: Tests baggage-delay claims with weaker documentation.

query: My flight was delayed 3 hours and I missed my connection. I paid for dinner at the airport. I booked the trip with my American Express card. Does the Amex trip delay benefit cover this?
notes: Short delay intended to fall below common Amex trip-delay thresholds.

query: My flight was delayed 8 hours overnight and I had to pay for a hotel, dinner, breakfast, and taxi rides. I booked the ticket with my American Express card and I kept all receipts. Can I claim trip delay coverage?
notes: Longer Amex delay case with a complete expense and receipt trail.

query: My checked bag was delayed for more than 24 hours on an international trip. I paid for toiletries and basic clothing and used my Mastercard to book the trip. I still have my receipts and baggage report. Is there baggage delay coverage?
notes: Tests Mastercard baggage-delay benefit retrieval and extraction.

query: I had to cancel my trip because of a covered emergency and I booked the trip with a Mastercard. I lost prepaid travel expenses and want to know whether trip cancellation benefits may apply.
notes: Tests retrieval of trip cancellation material with underspecified facts.

query: My Delta flight was delayed 9 hours overnight because of weather. Delta did not give me a hotel voucher, so I paid for a hotel, dinner, breakfast, and rides to and from the hotel. I booked the trip with my American Express card and I saved all of my receipts. Am I eligible for anything from Delta or from my card benefits?
notes: Tests combined Delta and Amex reasoning with both airline reimbursement and card trip-delay benefits potentially relevant.

query: My Alaska Airlines flight was delayed 4 hours and I paid for dinner at the airport. I booked the trip with my American Express card and I have the receipt. Can I get reimbursed through my card benefits?
notes: Tests short delay below common Amex trip-delay thresholds on a non-Delta airline.

query: My checked bag on Alaska Airlines was delayed for 30 hours after my trip. I had to buy toiletries and basic clothes, and I kept my receipts and baggage delay report. I booked the trip with my Mastercard. Is there anything I can claim from the airline or my card?
notes: Tests baggage-delay benefits with Alaska plus Mastercard and complete documentation.

query: I booked a Delta trip with my Mastercard and had to cancel because of a family emergency. I lost some prepaid travel expenses, but I am not sure whether my reason counts as a covered event. Would trip cancellation benefits apply?
notes: Tests trip cancellation with incomplete facts about whether the cancellation reason is covered.

query: My Alaska Airlines flight was delayed 12 hours overnight because of weather and I had to pay for a hotel and meals. I booked the trip with my Chase Sapphire Preferred card, but I lost most of my receipts. Am I still eligible for anything?
notes: Tests otherwise strong eligibility facts weakened by missing documentation.

query: My checked bag on Delta arrived late. I used my Mastercard to book the trip and I have receipts. Is this enough for baggage delay coverage?
notes: Tests baggage delay that is likely below common benefit timing thresholds.

query: My checked bag on Delta was delayed for 28 hours after my flight. I filed a baggage delay report with Delta at the airport and kept all receipts for toiletries and a change of clothes. I booked the trip with my Chase Sapphire Preferred card. Can I be reimbursed for these expenses?
notes: Now includes baggage report + receipts, making both airline and Chase benefit eligibility clearly satisfied.

query: My Delta flight was delayed 4 hours overnight due to a mechanical issue. I booked the entire round-trip ticket with my American Express Platinum card and I kept all receipts. Am I eligible for reimbursement?
notes: Specifies Amex Platinum (which has trip delay coverage) and full round-trip purchase, removing ambiguity in card eligibility.

query: I had to cancel my Alaska Airlines trip because I felt sick before departure. I booked the trip with my American Express Platinum card and have medical documentation and receipts for my nonrefundable travel expenses. Would trip cancellation benefits cover this?
notes: Adds verified covered event (hospitalization) and documentation, making trip cancellation eligibility clearly satisfied.

query: My Alaska Airlines flight was delayed 11 hours overnight and I had to pay for a hotel, dinner, breakfast, and a taxi. I booked the trip with my debit card and saved all of my receipts. Is trip delay coverage likely to apply?
notes: Tests a strong Mastercard trip-delay scenario with overnight delay and documented expenses.
